variants.name: sidebutton-mcp-claude-code-extension
variants.title: SideButton MCP + Claude Code + Chrome extension
variants.description: Default. Full SideButton agent: MCP server on :9876, Claude Code CLI, Chrome with the SideButton extension auto-installed via managed policy, and a post-services wait for the browser_connected handshake.

variants.name: sidebutton-mcp-claude-code
variants.title: SideButton MCP + Claude Code (no Chrome extension)
variants.description: Same as default but skips the Chrome managed-policy block that force-installs the SideButton extension and skips the browser_connected handshake wait. Chrome still boots — without the extension.
